svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="一次工具调用时序" id="bridge-seq"> <mxGraphModel dx="-579" dy="-212" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="P_U" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="运营前端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_U" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="100" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="100" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="ChatService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="200" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_C" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_M" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="LLM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="370" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_M" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="430" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="430" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_FTC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="FunctionToolCallback" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="540" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_FTC" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="620" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_H" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="OrderQueryTool" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="130" x="760" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_H" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="825" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="825" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P_LG" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="审计日志" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="120" x="950" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PL_LG" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5eead4;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1010" y="84" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1010" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="今天订单怎么样(tenantId, userId)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="100" y="120" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="120" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="prompt + toolCallbacks + toolContext"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="168" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="430" y="168" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="决定调 query_orders(args)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="430" y="216" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="216" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M4" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;" value="self: 从 toolContext 构造 ToolContext"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="660" y="260" /> <mxPoint x="660" y="285" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="285" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="620" y="260" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="660" y="260" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M5" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="execute(args, toolCtx)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="620" y="320" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="825" y="320" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M6" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;" value="落审计(开始)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="825" y="365" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1010" y="365" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M7" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="ToolResult.success(订单数据)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="825" y="410" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="410" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M8" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;" value="落审计(结果 / 耗时)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="620" y="455" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1010" y="455" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M9" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="结果回喂续生成"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="620" y="500" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="430" y="500" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M10" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="Flux 增量文本"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="430" y="545" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="545" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M11" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="SSE delta(打字机效果)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="590" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="100" y="590" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=middle;" value="图例：实线 = 调用 / 同步返回；虚线箭头 = 异步返回值；青绿色 = 审计落库。租户上下文通过 toolContext 从 ChatService 一路透传到业务工具。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1030" x="40" y="635" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
